metadata.description: Parallel pipeline extensions for BMAD Method

plugins.name: bmm
plugins.description: Parallel pipeline skills for BMAD BMM workflows. Speeds up story development, code review, and story creation by running independent tasks concurrently with Agent Teams.

plugins.name: tea
plugins.description: Parallel pipeline skills for BMAD TEA workflows. Speeds up test generation (ATDD, automate) and test quality review by running independent tasks concurrently with Agent Teams.

plugins.name: orch
plugins.description: Pipeline orchestration skills for BMAD workflows. Automates multi-step story execution cycles by coordinating sequential workflow steps across BMM and TEA plugins.
